title: Undertale Delight
body:
Summary:

This mod add some foods,items and plants from the game"Undertale",And restored most of its features, allowing players to experience the fun of making Undertale food in Minecraft as well.

Update Trend:

Add more foods and items from Undertale.

Acknowledgement List

**Toby Fox**: Author of Undertale.
**Temmie Chang**: The main art design of Undertale.
Production team of Undertale
